Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.

JSONL is a text format where each line is a valid JSON value, separated by newline characters. It is the standard format for LLM fine-tuning datasets, streaming AI inference, log aggregation, and bulk data pipelines.

This package provides JsonlSerializer and JsonlParser which extend the JSON serializer/parser to produce and consume newline-delimited JSON.

Example:

// Serialize a list of beans to JSONL String jsonl = Jsonl.of(myList); // Parse JSONL back to a list List<MyBean> list = Jsonl.to(jsonl, List.class, MyBean.class);

See Also:
  • JSON Lines Specification
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    JsonlConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties for REST classes and methods using JSONL.
    JsonlConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @JsonlConfig annotation.
    JsonlConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies JsonlConfig annotations to a JsonParser.Builder.
    JsonlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies JsonlConfig annotations to a JsonSerializer.Builder.
    JsonlParser
    Parses JSONL (JSON Lines) input into POJO models.
    JsonlParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonlParser.
    JsonlParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to JSONL (JSON Lines).
    JsonlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonlSerializer.
    JsonlSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonlTokenReader
    Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSONL / NDJSON format.
    JsonlTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the JSONL / NDJSON format.
